name: tier-b/elixir/04-no-apps-path
description: Single-package mix.exs without apps_path: not an umbrella; no workspace evidence; detected=false.

manifests.mix.exs:
defmodule MyApp.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :my_app,
      version: "0.1.0",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      deps: deps()
    ]
  end

  def application do
    [extra_applications: [:logger]]
  end

  defp deps, do: []
end
